data.text: Generated pages on Tailwind CDN: preflight resets h1/h2 to body size — any heading without an explicit text-[px] class silently collapses. Knowledge on generated-page authoring does not name this trap; 3/6 rebuild sites hit it in one day.

VR baselines captured without a scroll-through settle penalize a rebuild for being MORE complete than the capture (lazy regions render black in the baseline). visual-regression knowledge does not cover baseline honesty for lazy-loading pages.
Rebuild-from-capture craft: crops must contain ONLY artwork, never headlines/CTAs (HTML renders those; text inside a crop = double text). No knowledge file owns rebuild/clone-adapt craft.

Multi-site lab/dogfood workspaces have no layout convention — 3 generations of dirs accumulated and builder agents dumped scripts at the root until a manifest README was hand-written. Candidate: lab workspace scaffold + layout rule.

Executor sessions can claim work happened without a diff: two fix rounds reported done while file state was unchanged. Knowledge lacks a verify-by-artifact discipline (mtime/diff/render evidence before accepting any done-claim).

Ghost-region taste principle (from lab curator sweep 2026-07-15, recurred 4/7 rebuilds: apple black bento tiles, clickhouse near-black stack/logo_strip crops, cohere literal placeholder boxes, linear empty glow section). A rebuild/design must NEVER ship a bordered or backgrounded region larger than ~200x200px with no artwork and no useful innerText — an empty framed box reads as broken/unfinished, worse than no box. Rule: fill it with the real crop, replace with HTML content (chip grid, text), or COLLAPSE the section. A large empty region is worse than a small dense one. Corollary: a crop whose mean luma is within ~5% of the section background is effectively empty even if the file exists.

Rebuild/clone-adapt/design-from-URL delivery ships screenshot-crops when the source already serves sharp originals (inline-SVG logos, 1560x1248+ product-UI rasters) sitting unused in the mirror/harvest. Need a delivery-assets standard + resolver + avoidable-screenshot-crop lint. Owner: get original assets, not screenshots like a noob.

No knowledge file owns rebuild/clone-adapt craft end to end (probe -> asset-resolve -> spec -> build -> masked-diff verify -> ledger). Candidate consolidated workflow knowledge, feeding /ui:from-url and /ui:from-design-md.

Figma live-sync live dogfood (VSF, 21 real events): the wire works end-to-end (capture→log→panel→Sync→apply→cursor) but the registry did NOT change. Reason: the registry stores structure+tokens+markup, NOT raw visual values; the common edits (padding/height/x/y/width/visible/layoutAlign/componentProperties) map to no registry field, so apply is a no-op for them. Only name is structural. New components → pending (no markup). Owner intuition (my edits flow in) wants a component MIRROR, but capturing changedProp NAMES is not enough — need per-component full re-export (markup+tokens) on change. Decision: live-sync tracks STRUCTURE only, or MIRRORS the component (heavier).

Figma live-sync apply advanced the cursor past 21 events that produced ZERO registry writes. Panel says N changes Synced but nothing landed → misleading (no-silent-caps flavor). Apply/panel should report what actually landed (added/updated/deprecated counts that changed the registry), not raw event count; processed != applied.
